description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular fuselage painted in a dark green camouflage pattern, featuring red star insignias and the number '60' on the side. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with prominent control surfaces and underwing pylons. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers with a slight anhedral angle. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a clear canopy, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The landing gear is extended, showing a tricycle arrangement with two main wheels and a nose wheel. The overall design is optimized for high-speed flight and maneuverability, typical of Soviet-era fighter jets.
description: A dark green, swept-wing military jet with red star insignias, a single vertical tail, and a forward cockpit under a clear canopy. The aircraft features a tricycle landing gear and prominent underwing pylons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and swept-back wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the camouflage paint, red star insignias, number '60', and the full length of the swept wings and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single jet exhaust, tail structure, and the anhedral angle of the horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aircraft's profile, landing gear, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine mounted in the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers with anhedral angle.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
